description.en: You find a glowing fountain. The water looks inviting.
description.zh: 你发现了一个发光的喷泉。泉水看起来很诱人。

result_text.en: The water refreshes you! +20 HP
result_text.zh: 泉水让你恢复了活力！+20生命值

result_text.en: You continue your journey.
result_text.zh: 你继续你的旅程。

description.en: You discover a locked chest. It might contain treasure... or a trap.
description.zh: 你发现了一个上锁的箱子。它可能装着宝藏……或者陷阱。

result_text.en: You found gold! +30 gold
result_text.zh: 你找到了金币！+30金币

result_text.en: It was trapped! You take 10 damage.
result_text.zh: 这是个陷阱！你受到10点伤害。

result_text.en: Better safe than sorry.
result_text.zh: 小心驶得万年船。

description.en: A mysterious merchant offers you a deal.
description.zh: 一个神秘的商人向你提出交易。

result_text.en: You bought a potion and drank it. +25 HP, -20 gold
result_text.zh: 你买了药水并喝下。+25生命值，-20金币

result_text.en: The merchant shrugs and disappears.
result_text.zh: 商人耸耸肩消失了。

description.en: You find an ancient shrine. A voice whispers: 'Offer gold for power, or take a blessing.'
description.zh: 你发现了一座古老的神殿。一个声音低语道：'献上金币换取力量，或接受祝福。'

result_text.en: Divine energy flows through you! +40 HP, -50 gold
result_text.zh: 神圣的能量流过你的身体！+40生命值，-50金币

result_text.en: You feel slightly stronger. +15 HP
result_text.zh: 你感觉稍微强壮了一些。+15生命值

result_text.en: You bow and continue your journey.
result_text.zh: 你鞠躬后继续你的旅程。

description.en: A hooded figure approaches you. 'I can share knowledge... for a price.'
description.zh: 一个戴兜帽的人向你走来。'我可以分享知识……但需要付出代价。'

result_text.en: The stranger teaches you survival techniques. +30 HP, -20 gold
result_text.zh: 陌生人教给你生存技巧。+30生命值，-20金币

result_text.en: The stranger vanishes into the shadows.
result_text.zh: 陌生人消失在阴影中。

description.en: A dark altar radiates malevolent energy. Gold coins are scattered around it.
description.zh: 一座黑暗的祭坛散发着邪恶的能量。周围散落着金币。

result_text.en: You grab the gold quickly. +50 gold
result_text.zh: 你迅速拿走了金币。+50金币

result_text.en: Dark energy surges through you! -15 HP
result_text.zh: 黑暗能量涌入你的身体！-15生命值

result_text.en: You wisely avoid the cursed place.
result_text.zh: 你明智地避开了这个被诅咒的地方。

description.en: You discover a natural spring with crystal-clear water. The air feels rejuvenating.
description.zh: 你发现了一处天然泉水，水质清澈见底。空气中弥漫着恢复活力的气息。

result_text.en: You feel greatly refreshed! +35 HP
result_text.zh: 你感到精神焕发！+35生命值

result_text.en: You press onward.
result_text.zh: 你继续前进。

description.en: You stumble upon a hidden gambling den. A dealer offers you a game of chance.
description.zh: 你偶然发现了一个隐秘的赌场。一个荷官邀请你玩一局。

result_text.en: You win big! +80 gold
result_text.zh: 你大获全胜！+80金币

result_text.en: You win a modest amount. +30 gold
result_text.zh: 你赢得了一些金币。+30金币

result_text.en: You walk away from the temptation.
result_text.zh: 你抵制住了诱惑。

description.en: You find an injured adventurer. They offer to share their supplies if you help them.
description.zh: 你发现了一个受伤的冒险者。如果你帮助他们，他们愿意分享补给。

result_text.en: They thank you and give you gold. +60 gold, -10 HP
result_text.zh: 他们感谢你并给了你金币。+60金币，-10生命值

result_text.en: You continue on your way.
result_text.zh: 你继续你的路。

description.en: You discover a dusty library filled with ancient tomes. One book glows with magical energy.
description.zh: 你发现了一座布满灰尘的图书馆，里面摆满了古老的典籍。一本书散发着魔法能量。

result_text.en: Ancient wisdom fills your mind! +40 HP
result_text.zh: 古老的智慧充盈你的心灵！+40生命值

result_text.en: You find hidden gold among the books. +40 gold
result_text.zh: 你在书籍中找到了隐藏的金币。+40金币

result_text.en: You decide not to disturb this place.
result_text.zh: 你决定不打扰这个地方。

description.en: You find an abandoned training ground with practice dummies and weapons. You could train here.
description.zh: 你发现了一个废弃的训练场，里面有训练假人和武器。你可以在这里训练。

result_text.en: Your combat skills improve! Permanent +2 Attack
result_text.zh: 你的战斗技巧提升了！永久+2攻击力

result_text.en: You learn to better protect yourself! Permanent +1 Defense
result_text.zh: 你学会了更好地保护自己！永久+1防御力

result_text.en: You decide not to waste time here.
result_text.zh: 你决定不在这里浪费时间。

description.en: A sacred pool radiates divine energy. Bathing in it might grant permanent blessings.
description.zh: 一个圣池散发着神圣的能量。在其中沐浴可能会获得永久的祝福。

result_text.en: Divine power strengthens your body! Permanent +10 Max HP
result_text.zh: 神圣的力量强化了你的身体！永久+10最大生命值

result_text.en: The water heals your wounds. +30 HP
result_text.zh: 池水治愈了你的伤口。+30生命值

result_text.en: You respectfully leave the sacred place.
result_text.zh: 你恭敬地离开了这个神圣的地方。

description.en: A legendary weapon master offers to teach you advanced techniques for a price.
description.zh: 一位传奇武器大师愿意付费教你高级技巧。

result_text.en: The master teaches you deadly techniques! Permanent +3 Attack, -60 gold
result_text.zh: 大师教给你致命的技巧！永久+3攻击力，-60金币

result_text.en: The master nods and disappears.
result_text.zh: 大师点点头后消失了。

description.en: You discover an ancient forge still burning with magical flames. The heat is intense.
description.zh: 你发现了一座仍在燃烧魔法火焰的远古熔炉。热度非常强烈。

text.en: Temper your body in the flames

result_text.en: The flames forge your body like steel! Permanent +15 Max HP
result_text.zh: 火焰像锻造钢铁一样锤炼了你的身体！永久+15最大生命值

result_text.en: You learn ancient smithing secrets! Permanent +2 Defense
result_text.zh: 你学会了古老的锻造秘密！永久+2防御力

result_text.en: The heat is too intense. You leave.
result_text.zh: 热度太强烈了。你离开了。

description.en: You reach a rickety bridge over a deep chasm. It looks unstable but might hold your weight.
description.zh: 你来到一座横跨深渊的摇摇欲坠的桥梁。它看起来不稳定，但也许能承受你的重量。

result_text.en: You make it across safely!
result_text.zh: 你安全地通过了！

result_text.en: The bridge collapses! You barely escape. -12 HP
result_text.zh: 桥梁坍塌了！你勉强逃脱。-12生命值

result_text.en: You find a safer path around.
result_text.zh: 你找到了一条更安全的路。

description.en: You find a large, glowing egg. It pulses with strange energy. What could be inside?
description.zh: 你发现了一个巨大的发光蛋。它散发着奇异的能量。里面会是什么？

result_text.en: Gold coins spill out! +70 gold
result_text.zh: 金币洒了出来！+70金币

result_text.en: Warm energy flows into you. +25 HP
result_text.zh: 温暖的能量流入你的身体。+25生命值

result_text.en: You decide not to disturb it.
result_text.zh: 你决定不打扰它。

description.en: Green gas seeps from cracks in the walls. The air becomes thick and toxic.
description.zh: 绿色的气体从墙壁的裂缝中渗出。空气变得浓稠而有毒。

result_text.en: You inhale some gas. -8 HP
result_text.zh: 你吸入了一些毒气。-8生命值

result_text.en: You find a stash of supplies! +35 gold
result_text.zh: 你找到了一批补给！+35金币

text.en: Wait for the gas to clear

result_text.en: The gas eventually dissipates.
result_text.zh: 毒气最终散去了。

description.en: An ornate mirror reflects your image, but something seems different about your reflection.
description.zh: 一面华丽的镜子映出你的影像，但你的倒影似乎有些不同。

result_text.en: You see your true potential! Permanent +2 Attack
result_text.zh: 你看到了自己的真正潜力！永久+2攻击力

result_text.en: Your reflection attacks you! -18 HP
result_text.zh: 你的倒影攻击了你！-18生命值

result_text.en: You walk past without looking.
result_text.zh: 你没有看它就走过去了。

description.en: A wounded beast blocks your path. It looks hungry and desperate, but not immediately hostile.
description.zh: 一只受伤的野兽挡住了你的去路。它看起来又饿又绝望，但并不立即表现出敌意。

result_text.en: The beast licks your wounds gratefully. +35 HP, -20 gold
result_text.zh: 野兽感激地舔舐你的伤口。+35生命值，-20金币

result_text.en: You drive it away but get injured. -20 HP
result_text.zh: 你赶走了它但受了伤。-20生命值

result_text.en: You slip by unnoticed.
result_text.zh: 你悄悄溜了过去。

description.en: You enter a cave filled with glowing crystals. Their energy is palpable.
description.zh: 你进入了一个布满发光水晶的洞穴。它们的能量清晰可感。

result_text.en: You collect valuable crystals. +45 gold
result_text.zh: 你收集了珍贵的水晶。+45金币

result_text.en: Crystal energy revitalizes you. +28 HP
result_text.zh: 水晶能量让你恢复活力。+28生命值

result_text.en: You respect the natural beauty.
result_text.zh: 你尊重这份自然之美。

description.en: A swirling portal appears before you. Strange whispers emanate from within.
description.zh: 一个旋转的传送门出现在你面前。里面传来奇怪的低语。

result_text.en: You emerge in a treasure room! +55 gold
result_text.zh: 你出现在一个宝藏室！+55金币

result_text.en: Something bites your hand! -14 HP
result_text.zh: 有东西咬了你的手！-14生命值

result_text.en: The portal fades behind you.
result_text.zh: 传送门在你身后消失了。

description.en: An old blacksmith offers his services. His forge burns bright with magical flames.
description.zh: 一位老铁匠提供他的服务。他的熔炉燃烧着明亮的魔法火焰。

text.zh: 支付强化护甲费用（50金币）

result_text.en: Your armor is reinforced! Permanent +2 Defense, -50 gold
result_text.zh: 你的护甲被强化了！永久+2防御力，-50金币

result_text.en: The blacksmith patches you up. +22 HP
result_text.zh: 铁匠帮你修补伤口。+22生命值

result_text.en: You thank him and leave.
result_text.zh: 你感谢他后离开了。

description.en: A massive pile of gold sits in the center of the room, surrounded by ominous runes.
description.zh: 房间中央堆着一大堆金币，周围环绕着不祥的符文。

result_text.en: The curse strikes you! +90 gold, -15 HP
result_text.zh: 诅咒击中了你！+90金币，-15生命值

result_text.en: You take a safe amount. +35 gold
result_text.zh: 你拿了安全的数量。+35金币

result_text.en: Wisdom prevails over greed.
result_text.zh: 智慧战胜了贪婪。

description.en: A towering statue comes to life. 'Prove your worth, and I shall grant you power.'
description.zh: 一座高耸的雕像活了过来。'证明你的价值，我将赐予你力量。'

result_text.en: The guardian blesses your weapon! Permanent +3 Attack
result_text.zh: 守护者祝福了你的武器！永久+3攻击力

result_text.en: Ancient knowledge strengthens you! Permanent +12 Max HP
result_text.zh: 远古知识强化了你！永久+12最大生命值

result_text.en: The guardian nods approvingly.
result_text.zh: 守护者赞许地点头。

description.en: You discover an alchemist's lab filled with bubbling potions and strange ingredients.
description.zh: 你发现了一个炼金术士的实验室，里面装满了冒泡的药水和奇怪的材料。

result_text.en: The elixir enhances your muscles! Permanent +2 Attack, -40 gold
result_text.zh: 药剂增强了你的肌肉！永久+2攻击力，-40金币

result_text.en: The potion tastes sweet and heals you. +20 HP
result_text.zh: 药水味道甘甜，治愈了你。+20生命值

result_text.en: You decide not to risk unknown potions.
result_text.zh: 你决定不冒险尝试未知药水。

description.en: The ceiling begins to crumble! Rocks fall all around you.
description.zh: 天花板开始崩塌！石头从四周落下。

result_text.en: You narrowly avoid the falling debris!
result_text.zh: 你险险避开了落下的碎石！

result_text.en: Some rocks hit you. -6 HP
result_text.zh: 一些石头击中了你。-6生命值

result_text.en: You find coins in the debris! +25 gold
result_text.zh: 你在碎石中找到了金币！+25金币

description.en: Ancient runes glow on the walls, pulsing with arcane power. You can feel their energy.
description.zh: 古老的符文在墙上发光，散发着奥术力量。你能感受到它们的能量。

result_text.en: You learn ancient combat techniques! Permanent +2 Attack
result_text.zh: 你学会了古老的战斗技巧！永久+2攻击力

result_text.en: Your body is fortified by ancient magic! Permanent +8 Max HP
result_text.zh: 你的身体被古老魔法强化！永久+8最大生命值

result_text.en: You walk past the mysterious symbols.
result_text.zh: 你走过这些神秘的符号。

description.en: You find an abandoned adventurer's camp. Supplies are scattered everywhere.
description.zh: 你发现了一个废弃的冒险者营地。补给散落一地。

result_text.en: You find coins and gems! +38 gold
result_text.zh: 你找到了金币和宝石！+38金币

result_text.en: You rest and recover your strength. +26 HP
result_text.zh: 你休息并恢复了体力。+26生命值

result_text.en: Something feels wrong. You leave quickly.
result_text.zh: 感觉有些不对劲。你迅速离开了。

description.en: A tear in reality opens before you. Past and future collide in a swirl of energy.
description.zh: 现实的裂缝在你面前打开。过去和未来在能量漩涡中碰撞。

result_text.en: You grab treasure but temporal energy burns you! +100 gold, -18 HP
result_text.zh: 你抓到了宝藏但时间能量灼伤了你！+100金币，-18生命值

result_text.en: You glimpse future battles and learn! Permanent +2 Defense
result_text.zh: 你瞥见了未来的战斗并学到了东西！永久+2防御力

result_text.en: The rift closes harmlessly.
result_text.zh: 裂缝无害地关闭了。

description.en: A benevolent spirit appears and offers to aid you on your journey.
description.zh: 一个仁慈的灵魂出现，愿意在你的旅程中帮助你。

result_text.en: The spirit shields you with ethereal armor! Permanent +2 Defense
result_text.zh: 灵魂用虚灵护甲保护你！永久+2防御力

result_text.en: The spirit's touch heals your wounds. +45 HP
result_text.zh: 灵魂的触碰治愈了你的伤口。+45生命值

result_text.en: The spirit smiles and fades away.
result_text.zh: 灵魂微笑着消失了。

description.en: You discover a secret armory filled with ancient weapons and armor. The equipment looks well-maintained.
description.zh: 你发现了一个秘密军械库，里面装满了古老的武器和盔甲。装备看起来保养得很好。

result_text.en: You master new weapon techniques! Permanent +2 Attack
result_text.zh: 你掌握了新的武器技巧！永久+2攻击力

result_text.en: The armor fits perfectly! Permanent +2 Defense
result_text.zh: 盔甲非常合身！永久+2防御力

result_text.en: You decide not to disturb the ancient equipment.
result_text.zh: 你决定不打扰这些古老的装备。

description.en: A beautiful garden bathed in moonlight appears. Luminescent flowers bloom everywhere.
description.zh: 一个沐浴在月光下的美丽花园出现了。发光的花朵遍地盛开。

result_text.en: The flowers turn into gold coins! +42 gold
result_text.zh: 花朵变成了金币！+42金币

result_text.en: The peaceful atmosphere rejuvenates you. +32 HP
result_text.zh: 宁静的氛围让你恢复活力。+32生命值

result_text.en: You admire the beauty and move on.
result_text.zh: 你欣赏了美景后继续前进。

description.en: A demon materializes before you. 'Power for a price... are you willing to pay?'
description.zh: 一个恶魔在你面前现身。'力量是有代价的……你愿意付出吗？'

result_text.en: Dark power flows through you! +120 gold, -20 HP
result_text.zh: 黑暗力量流过你的身体！+120金币，-20生命值

result_text.en: Your virtue is rewarded with divine healing. +25 HP
result_text.zh: 你的美德得到了神圣治疗的奖励。+25生命值

result_text.en: The demon lashes out before vanishing! -16 HP
result_text.zh: 恶魔在消失前猛烈反击！-16生命值

description.en: You enter a cavern covered in ice. The cold is intense, but you notice something frozen inside.
description.zh: 你进入了一个被冰覆盖的洞穴。寒冷刺骨，但你注意到冰里冻着什么东西。

result_text.en: You find a frozen treasure chest! +65 gold
result_text.zh: 你找到了一个冰封的宝箱！+65金币

result_text.en: The cold hardens your body! Permanent +10 Max HP
result_text.zh: 寒冷强化了你的身体！永久+10最大生命值

result_text.en: The cold is unbearable. You escape.
result_text.zh: 寒冷难以忍受。你逃了出去。

description.en: A traveling merchant caravan offers various goods and services at reasonable prices.
description.zh: 一支旅行商队以合理的价格提供各种商品和服务。

result_text.en: The trainer teaches you new techniques! Permanent +2 Attack, -35 gold
result_text.zh: 训练师教给你新技巧！永久+2攻击力，-35金币

result_text.en: You purchase and use healing supplies. +35 HP, -20 gold
result_text.zh: 你购买并使用了治疗补给。+35生命值，-20金币

result_text.en: You wave goodbye to the merchants.
result_text.zh: 你向商人们挥手告别。

description.en: You discover a dark ritual circle. Ancient runes glow with crimson light. You sense powerful magic here.
description.zh: 你发现了一个黑暗的祭祀法阵。古老的符文闪烁着深红色的光芒。你感受到这里有强大的魔力。

text.en: Sacrifice HP for power (+5 attack permanently, -30 HP)
text.zh: 献祭生命换取力量（永久+5攻击，-30生命值）

result_text.en: Dark energy flows into you! +5 attack permanently, but you lose 30 HP.
result_text.zh: 黑暗能量涌入你的身体！永久+5攻击，但你失去了30生命值。

result_text.en: You shatter the dark magic and find hidden gold! +50 gold
result_text.zh: 你粉碎了黑暗魔法并发现了隐藏的金币！+50金币

result_text.en: You wisely avoid the dark magic.
result_text.zh: 你明智地避开了黑暗魔法。

description.en: A ghostly figure materializes before you, offering strange deals from beyond the veil.
description.zh: 一个幽灵般的身影在你面前显现，提供来自彼岸的奇异交易。

result_text.en: Ethereal armor wraps around you! +3 defense permanently for 40 gold.
result_text.zh: 虚灵护甲包裹着你！花费40金币，永久+3防御。

text.en: Trade 60 gold for +15 max HP permanently
text.zh: 用60金币换取永久+15最大生命值

result_text.en: Life force surges through you! +15 max HP permanently for 60 gold.
result_text.zh: 生命力涌入你的身体！花费60金币，永久+15最大生命值。

result_text.en: The ethereal merchant fades away.
result_text.zh: 虚灵商人消失了。

description.en: You stumble upon a sleeping dragon guarding a massive pile of treasure. Do you dare approach?
description.zh: 你偶然发现一条沉睡的巨龙守护着一大堆宝藏。你敢靠近吗？

text.en: Sneak and steal treasure (80 gold, but 40% chance of -25 HP)
text.zh: 潜行偷取宝藏（80金币，但40%概率-25生命值）

result_text.en: You carefully grab the treasure...
result_text.zh: 你小心翼翼地拿取宝藏……

result_text.en: You wisely retreat without disturbing the dragon.
result_text.zh: 你明智地撤退，没有惊扰巨龙。

description.en: An ancient well radiates magical energy. You can hear whispers echoing from its depths.
description.zh: 一口古老的井散发着魔法能量。你能听到从井底传来的低语。

text.en: Throw in 30 gold and make a wish

result_text.en: The well grants your wish!
result_text.zh: 古井实现了你的愿望！

result_text.en: The mystical water heals you! +25 HP
result_text.zh: 神秘的井水治愈了你！+25生命值

result_text.en: You continue your journey.
result_text.zh: 你继续你的旅程。

description.en: You find the remains of an ancient battle. Broken weapons and armor litter the ground.
description.zh: 你发现了一场古老战斗的遗迹。破碎的武器和盔甲散落一地。

text.en: Search for salvageable equipment (60% chance +40 gold, 40% chance nothing)
text.zh: 搜寻可用的装备（60%概率+40金币，40%概率一无所获）

result_text.en: You search through the ruins...
result_text.zh: 你在废墟中搜寻……

text.en: Pay respects to the fallen (restore 20 HP)
text.zh: 向死者致敬（恢复20生命值）

result_text.en: The spirits of the fallen bless you. +20 HP
result_text.zh: 死者的灵魂祝福了你。+20生命值

result_text.en: You leave the battlefield behind.
result_text.zh: 你离开了战场。
